mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3C1-R1 — Zero-Byte Integrity Fix

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast
import hashlib
import json

root = Path("Z:/FOXAI")
drop = root / "AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1_R1"
installed = root / "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
original = Path("Z:/FOXAI/AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1/web_portable_dependency_closure_v1.py")

checks = [
    (drop / "web_portable_dependency_closure_v1r1.py", installed / "web_portable_dependency_closure_v1r1.py", "bc6f4b05f3f8916a4cd05d6ce4b76d9caa3cac865467a7153c7fa175275a4c78"),
    (drop / "WEB_PORTABLE_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1R1.json", installed / "WEB_PORTABLE_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1R1.json", "e5691a1439130a286816eb43508ea6cce980ef4d5beee4371304f4c67b93f576"),
    (drop / "README_V1A3C1_R1.md", installed / "README_V1A3C1_R1.md", "f2e01d3c42568bfdbfa3484fb2c09ed74f73671dc43ec96396524dbde24ec5d3"),
]
for source, target, expected_hash in checks:
    assert source.is_file(), source
    assert target.is_file(), target
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash

assert original.is_file(), original
assert hashlib.sha256(original.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == "da458a9a2eeca42b86d43b13ffb113a8417f182399683e758e56b74d8317f322"

script_text = (installed / "web_portable_dependency_closure_v1r1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script_text, str(installed / "web_portable_dependency_closure_v1r1.py"), "exec")
assert 'file_row.get("size_bytes") or -1' not in script_text
assert 'row.get("size_bytes") or -1' not in script_text
assert "required_nonnegative_int" in script_text
assert "verify_recorded_size_and_hash" in script_text
assert "K:/" not in script_text and "K:\\" not in script_text

tree = ast.parse(script_text)
imports = set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split(".")[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split(".")[0])
forbidden = {
    "subprocess", "socket", "urllib", "http", "ftplib", "requests",
    "pip", "ensurepip", "psutil", "winreg", "ctypes", "webbrowser",
    "importlib",
}
assert not (imports & forbidden), sorted(imports & forbidden)

contract = json.loads((installed / "WEB_PORTABLE_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1R1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract["mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-220855-64D244"
assert contract["corrects_mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-172935-37F095"
assert contract["original_builder_sha256"] == "da458a9a2eeca42b86d43b13ffb113a8417f182399683e758e56b74d8317f322"
assert contract["protected_direct_context_count"] == 1
assert contract["expected_preliminary_topology"] == {
    "reached_source_count": 57,
    "dependency_edge_count": 165,
    "unresolved_branch_count": 1,
}
assert contract["zero_byte_regression"]["size_bytes"] == 0
assert contract["zero_byte_regression"]["sha256"] == "e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855"
assert contract["scope"]["rollback_drive_k_accessed"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1_R1_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")

from pathlib import Path, PureWindowsPath
import json

output_dir = Path("Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260721-220855-64D244_V1A3C1_R1_WEB_PORTABLE_CLOSURE")
context = json.loads((output_dir / "WEB_PORTABLE_CONTEXT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
closure = json.loads((output_dir / "WEB_PORTABLE_FIRST_PARTY_CLOSURE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
conditional = json.loads((output_dir / "WEB_PORTABLE_CONDITIONAL_IMPORTS.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
unresolved = json.loads((output_dir / "WEB_PORTABLE_UNRESOLVED_BRANCHES.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
coverage = json.loads((output_dir / "WEB_PORTABLE_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
receipt = json.loads((output_dir / "WEB_PORTABLE_CLOSURE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

def norm(value):
    return str(PureWindowsPath(str(value or ""))).casefold()

assert context["protected_direct_context_count"] == 1
selected = context["context"]
assert norm(selected["launcher_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat")
assert norm(selected["script_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/core/foxai_web.py")
assert norm(selected["resolved_interpreter_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/env/python/python.exe")

assert closure["node_count"] == 57
assert closure["edge_count"] == 165
assert closure["all_edges_have_exact_source_path_and_line"] is True
zero_nodes = [row for row in closure["nodes"] if norm(row.get("path")) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/core/__init__.py")]
assert len(zero_nodes) == 1
assert zero_nodes[0]["expected_size_bytes"] == 0
assert zero_nodes[0]["expected_sha256"] == "e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855"

assert coverage["preliminary_reached_source_count"] == 57
assert coverage["preliminary_dependency_edge_count"] == 165
assert coverage["preliminary_unresolved_branch_count"] == 1
assert coverage["zero_byte_indexed_source_accepted"] is True
assert coverage["maximum_reads_per_source_file"] <= 1
assert coverage["peak_source_bytes_in_memory"] <= 8388608
assert coverage["other_protected_contexts_built"] == 0
assert coverage["cartesian_all_imports_by_all_contexts_expansion"] is False

assert conditional["conditionally_guarded_imports_labeled_unconditional"] == 0
assert unresolved["unresolved_branches_labeled_confirmed"] == 0
assert receipt["internal_deterministic_rebuild_match"] is True
assert receipt["zero_byte_indexed_source_accepted"] is True
assert receipt["interpreter_child_processes"] == 0
assert receipt["shell_child_processes"] == 0
assert receipt["network_used"] is False
assert receipt["packages_installed"] is False
assert receipt["models_loaded"] is False
assert receipt["existing_foxai_source_modified"] is False

total = sum(path.stat().st_size for path in output_dir.iterdir() if path.is_file())
assert total < 8388608
print(json.dumps({
    "status": "AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1_R1_APPLIED_VERIFIED",
    "protected_context_count": 1,
    "reached_source_count": closure["node_count"],
    "dependency_edge_count": closure["edge_count"],
    "preliminary_unresolved_branch_count": coverage["preliminary_unresolved_branch_count"],
    "zero_byte_source_accepted": coverage["zero_byte_indexed_source_accepted"],
    "zero_byte_source_path": "Z:/FOXAI/core/__init__.py",
    "maximum_reads_per_source_file": coverage["maximum_reads_per_source_file"],
    "peak_source_bytes_in_memory": coverage["peak_source_bytes_in_memory"],
    "total_output_bytes": total,
}, sort_keys=True))
